field.title: per_qual
field.guid_formula:
IF COUNTD([crm_id_y45m]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([qual_jotz]) / COUNTD([crm_id_y45m])
END
field.formula:
IF COUNTD([crm_id]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([qual]) / COUNTD([crm_id])
END

field.title: per_meet
field.guid_formula:
IF SUM([qual_jotz]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([meet_xzm5]) / SUM([qual_jotz])
END
field.formula:
IF SUM([qual]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([meet]) / SUM([qual])
END
